name: Sprint 25
context: Primary focus areas: Core CRM (6), Resilience (2), Settings (2).

open_tasks.title: Production hardening incl. HttpOnly auth sessions and release security gates
open_tasks.description: Production hardening incl. HttpOnly auth sessions and release security gates
open_tasks.summary: Railway production config, Vercel optimized, monitoring active, and browser auth migrated from localStorage/JS-readable bearer cookies to HttpOnly secure cookies or a server-managed Supabase session
open_tasks.definitionOfDone: Railway production config, Vercel optimized, monitoring active, and browser auth migrated from localStorage/JS-readable bearer cookies to HttpOnly secure cookies or a server-managed Supabase session; artifacts: production-checklist.md, security-scan-final.pdf, AuthContext.tsx, session-cleanup.ts, session.ts, proxy.ts; targets: 99.9% uptime, zero JS-readable bearer tokens in production, zero critical vulnerabilities; verified by: pnpm typecheck, pnpm test, pnpm lint, pnpm build, security review
open_tasks.definitionOfDoneSnapshot: Railway production config, Vercel optimized, monitoring active, and browser auth migrated from localStorage/JS-readable bearer cookies to HttpOnly secure cookies or a server-managed Supabase session

tasks.title: Experiment + Intelligence + AI Monitoring Wiring. Wire 7 dead endpoints: experiment.assignVariant, experiment.recordConversion, experiment.recordScore, intelligence.getInsightsSummary, intelligence.triggerPrediction, intelligence.updateContactInsights, ai-monitoring.getHallucinationReport. Backend built (IFC-025, IFC-095, IFC-117), zero web callers. Decision: wire to experiment dashboard (IFC-181) and AI monitoring page. Audit: artifacts/reports/dead-endpoints-audit.csv rows 19, 52-54, 66-69.

tasks.title: Billing/Auth/Subscription/Admin Miscellaneous Wiring. Wire 8 dead endpoints: billing.ensureCustomer, billing.getUsageMetrics, billing.updateBillingInformation, auth.getSessions, subscription.getPlans, subscription.toggleModule, autoresponse.submitForApproval, admin.queues.getByName. Backend built across IFC-006/IFC-014/IFC-028/IFC-099, zero web callers. admin.queues.getByName is completely phantom (no tests, no matrix entry) � needs queue inspector or admin tools UI. Audit: artifacts/reports/dead-endpoints-audit.csv rows 2, 29, 33-37, 104-105.
